_meta.task: Cross-domain consumption filter: production unified_reviewall_A polygon-conf threshold
_meta.notes: Applies the JHB-production polygon-confidence cut (c=0.925) at consumption time to SAM-refined predictions_metric.gpkg, mirroring the unified_reviewall_A_perdet_sam_maskbox_vexcel_2024_full382 production inventory. Used by scripts/analysis/filter_sam_inventory.py to freeze the 6-city cross-domain inventory before area_aggregate_eval.
